PETITION Petition Claiming Bequest From Escheated Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: TELEPHONE APPEARENCE BY RICHARD T. TOWSAW
COUNSEL STATES THE THE PUBLIC ADMIN. IS HOLDING FUNDS. PROBATE CODE 7663B RE: MONIESB ARE TO STAY WITH THE COUNTY. ACCORDING TO THE GOVERMENT CODE 552.5 COUNSEL WAS TO DO ADDFIDAVIT REQUESTING THE FUNDS. THE COUTNY REJECTED THE PLEADING AND ACCORDING TO THE CODE YOU MUST THEN PETITION THE COURT TO GET THE MONEY. COUNSEL IS TO SUBMIT TO THE COURT AN ORDER REQUESTING THAT THE PUBLIC ADMIN OR THE COUNTY TREASURER ISSUE CHECK FOR FUNDS.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON
